_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the shift-conflict (branch 3) of the excel-activities/delete-range-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (COMException 0x800A03EC Application-defined or object-defined error from Excel Range.Delete) → jobs logs (resolved DeleteRange config ShiftCells=True ShiftOption=ShiftUp on A3:C5 + pre-execution merged-region scan detecting D5:D7 on the bottom edge) → workflow source. The merged-region collision is the smoking gun: ShiftUp cannot move rows 6-7 into row 5 without breaking the merge anchor at D5.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f0033333-3333-4444-5555-666677778888 --state Faulted --output json
